title: High Frequency Murasama CIT
body:
**High Frequency Murasama - From Metal Gear Rising:Revengence to Minecraft**
____
_"A notorious blade passed down through generations of the Rodrigues family. Sam had it modified into a high-frequency blade, enhancing the already astonishing properties of the original metal and giving it an ominous crimson glow. An explosive charge housed in the scabbard enables a lightning-quick draw."_
- Also well known as JetStream Sam's signature blade.
____
**Features:**
- High detail model (80% base accuracy)
- Glowing LED details
- High quality sounds effect, which is recorded from the MGR game, about 20+ Sounds effects.

![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec6298ee2480df3d102322f5e4270c29be77deef.png) ![2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/701114d1167b89de9a3bd5facaf2b36bbddfb9c3.png)![3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b8719496b065e7d81f39cd55b0723c8e3945f376.png)
_____
**Requirements**
- For Optifine users require:
- Custom item models:On
- Emessive Textures:On
+ For Fabric users require:
- CIT Resewn.
- Optifabric is optional.
_____
**How to obtain**
- Use an Anvil, Netherite sword, shield and any kind of armors.
- Rename the sword to HF Murasama or Murasama
- Rename a shield to HF Sheath or Sheath
- Rename any armor sets to ST34LTH v4.03
_____
**Notes**
- This is a Remastered version from Feathered BlackSmith og model, which is the permission has been allowed by the Author, so there is NO illegal issues around this model!, Sheath Model made by Kazharz. Uploading permission has been granted.
- Sounds effects are CCI=0
- You are free to use this model as you like (Considering credit us).
- 3rd party reuploads are NOT allowed.
- Do NOT claim as your licking or selling this pack.
- Any illegal actions are NOT allowed.
_____
**Have Fun🔻**
